mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM sys_code_rule scr JOIN sys_code_rule_line l ON scr.rule_id = l.rule_id AND l.level_code = #{levelCode} AND l.level_value = #{levelValue} AND l.enabled_flag = '1' JOIN sys_code_rule_detail d ON l.rule_line_id = d.rule_line_id WHERE scr.rule_code = #{ruleCode} ORDER BY d.order_seq ASC
